nodes.label: AI as adjustable starting point
nodes.grounding_span: AI is good at generating a general starting point for a design, but struggles to make smaller refinements exactly the way I want them

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate with it through a task. I don't find that AI has sufficient understanding of larger tasks for me to be able to delegate complete tasks to it yet

nodes.label: AI output quality and appropriateness
nodes.label_negative: AI output inferior to human work
nodes.grounding_span: it surprised me with how good the drawing was. I felt that the drawing was better than what an artist could have created

nodes.label: AI as professional development tool
nodes.label_negative: Relying solely on AI for professional tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it certainly makes sense to maintain skillsets even if at some point in the future, AI could take over

nodes.label: AI training and improvement
nodes.grounding_span: I will definitely make an effort to get more familiar with how AI can be used to boost my productivity

nodes.label: Creative control and precision
nodes.grounding_span: when I need more precision in design work, I find that I prefer doing it myself

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: maintain skillsets even if at some point in the future, AI could take over

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for design tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it surprised me with how good the drawing was

nodes.label: Preference for human precision in final refinements
nodes.grounding_span: when I need more precision in design work, I find that I prefer doing it myself

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I will definitely make an effort to get more familiar with how AI can be used to boost my productivity

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through single-element edits vs. full restart
nodes.grounding_span: If there is a single element that needs to be changed, then I would ask for an edit. ... in cases where multiple elements of the image need to be changed, then I would rather create a new prompt

nodes.label: Self-directed learning and experimentation
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to try out different ways of using AI on my own since my use cases are often different from other people
